rule_metadata.name: SURICATA Websocket skipped end of payload

rules.rule_text: alert websocket any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA Websocket skipped end of payload"; app-layer-event:websocket.skip_end_of_payload; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2235000; rev:1;)
alert websocket any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA Websocket reassembly limit reached"; app-layer-event:websocket.reassembly_limit_reached; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2235001; rev:1;)
